latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: the moon shows us one face for a reason watch the moon s position because its rotation and orbit are locked together it spins once in about the same time it circles earth so the same side keeps facing us that is synchronized motion not stillness which orbit clue next

latest.title: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals

latest.title: Plants use trap hairs to count touches before snapping shut

latest.title: Snow monkeys bathe together to beat the cold
latest.script_key: watch their thick fur trap heat like a blanket that s why they cuddle in tight packs when it s below freezing newborns get carried in the center so none freeze would you trade a hot tub for this trick

latest.title: Deer don't just chill—they're always listening
latest.script_key: that deer isn t just resting its ears aren t flopping back they re rotating like satellite dishes catching every twig snap two football fields away that s why it can sleep standing up and still hear a cougar two minutes before you d notice the silence you ever wonder how they do it watch their ears next time

latest.title: Dolphins swim in perfect V formation
latest.script_key: they swim in perfect v s because the wave they create lifts the dolphin behind watch the one on the end tuck its fin that s why they rotate leaders every few minutes what would you do to feel that push

latest.title: Dolphins use signature whistles like names
latest.script_key: dolphins can call each other with signature whistles watch the group spacing because dolphins use sound to keep track of individuals in open water a signature whistle works like a personal label helping the pod reconnect when visibility drops ocean social life is loud which sound should we decode next

latest.title: Cats groom to reset their scent map
latest.script_key: cats use grooming to reset their scent map watch the tongue and paw movements because grooming spreads familiar scent across the coat that can help a cat settle after a tense moment and keep the fur ready for the next move the cleanup is also a signal which pet behavior should we decode next
